title: Hyena Mod
description: A minecraft mod that enriches minecraft savannas with hyenas
body:
![](https://github.com/TheBetterTruth/HyenaMod/blob/master/src/client/resources/assets/hyenamod/icon.png?raw=true) (Hyena ambient sounds might need to be improved) # Behavior - **Predatory Instincs**
Hyenas hunt sheep, chicken, rabbits, cats and any mob with low HP. - **Pack Defense**
When attacked, hyenas will not only defend themselves but also other nearby attacked Hyenas. - **Item Collectors**
They'll pick up *any* item dropped on the ground nearby. If they find something they like better, they'll drop what they have and snatch the new one. - **Item Preference**
Hyenas prioritize **food**, especially raw meat. Their food preference hierachy:
``` Beef > Porckchop > Mutton > Rabbit (Raw > Cooked > Rotten Flesh) ``` - **Item Consumption**
Hyenas will eventually eat the items they pick up > Players have a brief window to recover stolen items - either by killing a hyena or distracting it with a more preferred item. # Credit - **Mod idea**: [vico93](https://modrinth.com/user/vico93) - **Hyena sounds**: Provided by [Freesound](https://freesound.org)
